title: How a Godly Man Kills the Comparison He Calls Ambition
caption:
Your ambition might be envy in better clothes.

Colossians puts envy right next to greed and malice; put to death, not managed. Most men never catch it because it shows up disguised as a goal instead of a grudge. The raise you didn't want last year, the platform, the body, the relationship, all urgent the day someone else got it first.

A godly man stops measuring his obedience by another man's life and lets God set the pace of his own.

#faith #envy #ambition #discipline #christianman
